checks: Three independently deployable services with clear boundaries
Gateway is the only public port; internal services not exposed to clients
Inter-service communication over HTTP with graceful error handling
Per-service Dockerfile, requirements.txt, health check, and pytest tests
Environment-based config — no hardcoded hosts or secrets
'docker compose up' orchestrates all three services
summary: Three-service microservices system (API Gateway, User Service, Notification Service) with health checks, env-based config, per-service tests, and docker-compose orchestration.
